'''Harvie Hill''' (born 3 September 2003) is an English professional [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a {{rlp|pr}} for [[Hull FC]] in the [[Super League]].

==Playing career==
===Wigan Warriors===
In 2022 Hill made his [[Super League]] début for [[Wigan Warriors|Wigan]] against [[Hull Kingston Rovers]].<ref>{{cite news|url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/62661463|title=Super League: Hull KR 38-28 Wigan Warriors - Home side hold on despite late flurry|work=BBC Sport }}</ref>
On 24 February 2024, Hill played in Wigan's [[2024 World Club Challenge]] final victory over [[Penrith Panthers|Penrith]].<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/68337685|title=World Club Challenge: Wigan Warriors 16-12 Penrith Panthers - Cherry and Whites crowned world champions for fifth time|website=www.bbc.co.uk}}</ref>

===London Broncos (loan)===
On 10 February 2023 it was announced he would join the [[London Broncos]] on an initial one month loan.<ref>{{cite web|website=Cumbria Crack|title=Harvie Hill could face Whitehaven in London Broncos clash|url=https://cumbriacrack.com/2023/02/10/harvie-hill-could-face-whitehaven-in-london-broncos-clash/|accessdate=10 Feb 2023|date=10 Feb 2023}}</ref>

==Personal==
He is the son of former [[Oldham RLFC|Oldham]] and [[Whitehaven RLFC|Whitehaven]] player Howard Hill.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.newsandstar.co.uk/news/18945250.rugby-star-harvie-hill-signs-first-professional-contract/|title=Rugby star, Harvie Hill, signs first professional contract|publisher=News & Star}}</ref>
